projects.name: Smart Reply for Social Comments
projects.shortDescription: A lightweight assistant that helps you write better replies in comment threads—fast, thoughtful, and on-brand.
projects.cardContent:
Replying to Social Media CommentsMade Effortless.

A lightweight assistant that helps you write better replies in comment threads—fast, thoughtful, and on-brand.
projects.problem: Social Media Comment Suggestions is a lightweight assistant that helps people reply faster (and better) in comment threads.
projects.hypothesis: People who actively comment on social media will use and value AI-generated, context-aware comment suggestions because it helps them reply faster while sounding more thoughtful and on-brand.

projects.name: AutoCut Creator - Precut Your Videos by Transcript
projects.shortDescription: Save hours of editing with automatically organized, pre-cut takes. Simply choose the perfect take and you’re done.
projects.cardContent:
AutoCut Creator

Save hours of editing with automatically organized, pre-cut takes. Simply choose the perfect take and you’re done.
projects.problem: Creators waste time scrubbing timelines. They want to cut videos by selecting text, not dragging handles.

projects.name: EpicPhotoAI
projects.shortDescription: Turn a handful of uploads into professional-looking photos for dating, social, and personal branding—no photoshoot needed.
projects.cardContent:
EpicPhotoAI

Turn a handful of uploads into professional-looking photos for dating, social, and personal branding—no photoshoot needed.
projects.problem: EpicPhotoAI turns a handful of uploads into professional-looking photos in different styles—ideal for dating profiles, social media, and personal branding without booking a shoot.
projects.hypothesis: People who want better profile photos will prefer a fast, guided workflow (upload → pick a style → generate) because it produces multiple high-quality, on-brand options without the cost and friction of a photoshoot.
